user.title: Irrigation Proxy
user.description: Enter a name for this irrigation program.

zones.title: Zone Configuration
zones.description: Select the valve switch entities to control and set a default runtime.

data_description.zones: Select one or more switch entities that control irrigation valves.
data_description.duration_minutes: Default runtime per zone in minutes.

safety.title: Safety Settings
safety.description: Configure safety limits for valve operation.

data_description.max_runtime_minutes: Maximum time a valve can stay open before the deadman timer forces it closed.

error.no_zones_selected: Please select at least one valve entity.

abort.already_configured: An irrigation program with this name already exists.

init.title: Irrigation Proxy Options
init.description: Modify zone selection and safety settings.
